'''Skoloc Celchu''' was the brother of [[Mia Celchu|Mia]] and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]]. He was present on his home world of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] when it was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Appearances==
